calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Leah Anderson, is present.
Plaintiff, Jason Anderson, is present.
Attorney, Sean P. Joyce, representing the plaintiffs.

Defendant, Sara Riazi, is present.
Defendant, Gerald Taucreti, is present.
Attorney, Charles C. Huse, representing the defendants through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed. The trial date of June 2, 2008 is vacated.
